creator: andriy@whitebox.color-pro.com
text:
Manufacturer: Asus

Model: P5K SE from site http://www.asus.com.tw/products.aspx?l1=3&l2=11&l3=534&l4=0&model=1705&modelmenu=1

Northbridge Chipset / Socket:  Intel P35/ICH9 LGA775

Tested FreeBSD version: 6.2-STABLE and 6.2-RELEASE-p7

Notes: Southbridge SATA ports function only with generic driver(look at dmesg.txt in attachement)
Nice support for Realtek ALC883 HD audio
Marvell 88SE6111 unsupported (PATA + SATA On-the-Go)
Onboard Gigabit PCIe LAN controller unsupported(look at pciconf out here)

Fix: need drivers

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: pciconf -v -l from 6.2-RELEASE-p7
************

    subclass   = HOST-PCI
